en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 72

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 72
Top Question of the Week

What happens when your banks, cards and financial services cut you off thanks to a dusting DDoS or other guilt by association interaction with banned entities? How do you eat? Where do you sleep? Where do you build?

In light of the events of this past week, we decided to take a more profound look at the map architecture that we are currently building and how to configure it to become more decentralised at every stage. Here’s a sneak peak…
Most Common Repeat Question
Wen merge? What does it mean?
Is it really finally clear? Do we finally know the rough date when the merge will actually happen?

It really seems so! Mid September and Ethereum moves to PoS. The wait will finally be over. No more having to listen to countless misinformed debates about energy use and one more huge step on the path to ultimate scalability.
What will it mean for the DIGITALAX stack? Well, we’ll probably migrate more of the new protocol contracts back to Mainnet and also continue to explore new robust ZK L2 solutions.
Top Controversies

Where to start with this? The war on privacy and cryptography is back in full force. And why many thought for years that it was hyperbole, this last week proves that force is exactly what is being used to prohibit everything from private financial transactions to open source code. It’s clear from some points of you that officials in the US and allies in Europe have overplayed their hand.
But it’s highly unlikely that they are done yet.
What we need now is what we’ve always needed. To fully decentralise everything. What’s really clear now is that we have no time to waste.
Silly Fails and Trolling
How’s that Voyager deal working out for you?
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 72

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 72
Top سؤال من ال اسبوع

What happens when your banks, cards و financial services cut you off thanks الى a dusting DDoS or other guilt by association interaction مع banned entities? ازاي do you eat? Where do you sleep? Where do you build?

في light من ال events من this past اسبوع, we decided الى take a more profound look at ال map architecture that we are currently building و ازاي الى configure it الى become more decentralised at every stage. Here’s a sneak peak…
Most Common Repeat سؤال
إمتى الـ merge؟ يعني إيه أصلًا؟
Is it really finally clear? Do we finally know ال rough تاريخ when ال merge will actually happen?

It really seems so! Mid September و Ethereum moves الى PoS. ال wait will finally be over. No more having الى listen الى countless misinformed debates about energy use و one more huge step على ال path الى ultimate scalability.
What will it mean لـ ال DIGITALAX stack? Well, we’ll probably migrate more من ال جديد بروتوكول contracts back الى Mainnet و also continue الى explore جديد robust ZK L2 solutions.
أهم الجدل

Where الى start مع this? ال war على privacy و cryptography is back في full force. و ليه many thought لـ years that it was hyperbole, this last اسبوع proves that force is exactly what is being used الى prohibit everything من private financial transactions الى open source code. It’s clear من some points من you that officials في ال US و allies في Europe have overplayed their hand.
بس غالبًا جدًا هم لسه مخلصوش.
What we need now is what we’ve always needed. الى fully decentralise everything. What’s really clear now is that we have no time الى waste.
Silly Fails و Trolling
ازاي’s that Voyager deal working out لـ you?
